Years of Craft

What we do?

About Our Brand

At Ambergris, every bottle tells a story. We blend rare oils and precious essences sourced from around the world, creating fragrances that capture elegance, confidence, and timeless luxury.

Our master perfumers spend years perfecting each note, ensuring that every scent we create is unique, refined, and unforgettable — a true signature for those who appreciate the art of fragrance.

Featured Fragrances

Best Seller

Noir Élégance

A bold, woody fragrance with notes of oud, amber, and dark vanilla.

2200 EGP 1650 EGP

Velvet Rose

A romantic floral blend of Bulgarian rose, peony, and soft musk.

1950 EGP 1450 EGP
Limited Edition

Golden Amber

Warm and inviting, featuring amber, sandalwood, and saffron.

2100 EGP 1600 EGP

Citrus Mirage

A fresh, energizing fragrance with bergamot, neroli, and white musk.

1800 EGP 1350 EGP

Mystic Oud

An intense, mysterious scent of rare oud wood, spices, and leather.

2500 EGP 1900 EGP

Pure Jasmine

A delicate, feminine bouquet of jasmine, vanilla, and white tea.

2000 EGP 1500 EGP

Why Choose Ambergris

We are committed to delivering authentic luxury fragrances withexceptional quality and outstanding customer experience.

Authentic Perfumes

100% genuine fragrances sourced from trusted luxury brands.

Fast Delivery

Safe and fast shipping to your doorstep across the country.

Premium Packaging

Every order is beautifully packaged to create a luxury experience.

Secure Payment

Shop confidently using secure and trusted payment methods.

Subscribe to our Newsletter

Be the first to know about new fragrance launches, exclusive offers, and limited edition collections.

Customer Reviews

"The Noir Élégance has become my signature scent. I get compliments everywhere I go — pure luxury in a bottle."

- Ahmed Tarek

"The quality and longevity of these fragrances are unmatched. Ambergris has completely changed how I think about perfume."

- Karim Hassan

"Velvet Rose is simply stunning — elegant, romantic, and long-lasting. It's now a permanent part of my collection."

- Youssef Adel
